title: Luciano Serra, pilota
writer: Goffredo Alessandrini, Francesco Masoero, Fulvio Palmieri
actors: Amedeo Nazzari, Germana Paolieri, Roberto Villa
plot: Successful WWI pilot Luciano Serra has problems adjusting to an ordinary life in peace, so he leaves his family and becomes a pilot in America. In the 30s, his son in Italy wants also to become a pilot, and Luciano accepts an offe...
